name: Potato Chip Cookies # 3
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream together the brown sugar and shortening until smooth.
2. Add eggs one at a time, beating well after each addition.
3. Stir in the flour, baking soda, and vanilla extract until combined.
4. Fold in the crushed potato chips and chopped nuts to distribute evenly.
5. Scoop teaspoonfuls of dough onto ungreased cookie sheets.
6. Bake for 10-12 minutes at 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
7. Allow cookies to cool on the baking sheet for a few minutes before removing.
